author: @ThinkingandTinkering
text: Thanks for your comments - i think of the gap as a way of increasing reluctance and also as a way of giving the system an increased ability to absorb flux to my mind these are fundamental qualities of flux switching systems. lately i have been working on a purely mechanical system where the magnetic field polarity is being changed using a rotating wheel i have had some success and am nearly ready to post further videos - i am not quite sure what you mean by the field sticking - can you explain?

author: @manwar999
text: and by the way dont think i dont understand everything your doing because i do...think about the split in the core like a fly back so the electric field dont stick...

author: @manwar999
